title: How can deserts form next to oceans?
summary: Deserts are notoriously dry, so why do so many of them border oceans?

title: How to View the ‘Blood Moon’ Total Lunar Eclipse on March 3
summary: Next month, the Earth will come between the sun and the moon, causing the moon to take on an eerie reddish hue.

title: توقيف مقدم شرطة بحوزته 22 كيلوغراما من الشيرا بأكادير
summary: باشرت المصلحة الولائية للشرطة القضائية بأكادير، زوال السبت 21 فبراير، بحثاً قضائياً تحت إشراف النيابة العامة المختصة، من أجل تحديد الأفعال الإجرامية المنسوبة لمقدم شرطة يزاول عمله بشفشاون، بعدما جرى ضبطه متلبساً بحيازة 22 كيلوغراماً من مخدر الشيرا. ووفق المعطيات الأولية، فقد تمكنت عناصر الشرطة بأكا…
body: باشرت المصلحة الولائية للشرطة القضائية بأكادير، زوال السبت 21 فبراير، بحثاً قضائياً تحت إشراف النيابة العامة المختصة، من أجل تحديد الأفعال الإجرامية المنسوبة لمقدم شرطة يزاول عمله بشفشاون، بعدما جرى ضبطه متلبساً بحيازة 22 كيلوغراماً من مخدر الشيرا. ووفق المعطيات الأولية، فقد تمكنت عناصر الشرطة بأكادير، بتنسيق أكمل القراءة » المقالة توقيف مقدم شرطة بحوزته 22 كيلوغراما من الشيرا بأكادير fمنشورة على جريدة الصباح .

title: Scientists may have seen a star collapse directly into a black hole without exploding first
summary: A new study looked at how a massive star in the Andromeda Galaxy disappeared due to the formation of a black hole

title: Scientists propose new plan to 'catch' comet 3I/ATLAS — but we have to act fast
summary: A new study explores the challenges of catching interstellar comets like comet 3I/ATLAS

title: 2,000-year-old skulls reveal people in ancient Vietnam permanently blackened their teeth — a stylish practice that persists today
summary: In a study of 2,000-year-old skulls from Vietnam, archaeologists discovered that iron was the primary component that dyed teeth black.

title: A Galaxy Composed Almost Entirely of Dark Matter Has Been Confirmed
summary: What scientists thought were four separate star clusters are actually part of one nearly invisible system.

title: Ancient 'Asgard' microbe may have used oxygen long before it was plentiful on Earth, offering new clue to origins of complex life
summary: A new study suggests that ancient microbes once cast as oxygen haters may have actually learned to use the gas, offering a clue to how the first complex cells — and, eventually, all plants and animals — evolved.

title: Artemis II update: NASA targets March 6 for launch of historic moon mission following successful 'wet dress rehearsal'
summary: NASA is targeting March 6 as the earliest possible launch date for the Artemis II mission to the moon following a successful 'wet dress rehearsal' on Thursday.

title: Bungled Boeing Starliner mission was the highest order of mishap that put stranded astronauts at risk, report says
summary: The 2024 Starliner mission, which left astronauts Butch Wilmore and Suni Williams stranded in space for nine months, has received NASA's worst mishap classification in a damning report.

title: 95 million-year-old Spinosaurus had a scimitar-shaped head crest and waded through the Sahara's rivers like a 'hell heron'
summary: Researchers have identified a new Spinosaurus species with a blade-like crest in Niger, changing our understanding of dinosaur evolution and behavior.

title: Saturn's largest moon may actually be 2 moons in 1 — and helped birth the planet's iconic rings
summary: A new study hints that Saturn's largest moon, Titan, was created around 400 million years ago, when two massive moons smashed into each other. This hypothesis could also help to solve several other mysteries surrounding other moons and the planet's iconic rings.

title: 2,500-year-old 'primitive prosthetic' found on jaw of mummified Scythian woman who survived complex jaw surgery
summary: Researchers used CT scans to peer inside a partially mummified skull and discovered the woman survived jaw surgery 2,500 years ago.

title: Physicists recreated the first millisecond after the Big Bang — and found it was surprisingly soupy
summary: Scientists saw a quark plowing through primordial plasma for the first time, offering a rare look at the first moments after the Big Bang

title: 'Absolute surprise': Homo erectus skulls found in China are almost 1.8 million years old — the oldest evidence of the ancient human relatives in East Asia
summary: A new date for Homo erectus skulls found in central China provides new insight into how and when ancient human relatives reached eastern Asia.

title: The biggest trees in the Peruvian Amazon store the most carbon — and they also face the greatest threat from humans
summary: The Amazon's biggest trees store disproportionately more carbon than smaller trees do, new study finds. But in the Peruvian Amazon, large trees are currently prioritized for harvest.

title: 5,500 years ago, a teenage girl was buried with her father's bones on her chest, new DNA study reveals
summary: A novel DNA analysis of skeletons excavated from a Neolithic hunter-gatherer cemetery in Sweden has revealed surprising family relationships.

title: Our adorable, noodle-like ancestor had 4 eyes, half-a-billion-year-old fossils reveal
summary: The earliest recorded vertebrates had four eyes to escape predators in the ancient Cambrian ocean, according to half-a-billion-year-old fossils from China that shed light on our evolutionary origins.

title: Hidden slippery clay on seafloor may have worsened devastating 2011 tsunami in Japan
summary: A thick layer of slippery clay on the ocean floor may have formed the weak spot that enabled a magnitude 9.1 quake to make such a devastating tsunami.

title: Vanishing lakes in Tibet may have triggered earthquakes by awakening faults in Earth's crust
summary: Shrinking lakes in Tibet likely woke up long-dormant tectonic faults, a new study finds. The findings strengthen the link between climate change and earthquakes

title: Hidden beauty of Zimbabwe's 2.5 billion-year-old 'geological marvel' revealed in striking astronaut photo — Earth from space
summary: A 2010 astronaut photo shows off the astonishing scale of the Great Dyke of Zimbabwe, which stretches over 340 miles (550 kilometers). The lengthy structure, which is not actually a dike, is full of extremely valuable minerals that fuel a massive mining industry.

title: Tumaco-Tolita Seated Elder: This 2,000-year-old depiction of an aged man with wrinkles struck fear in people because it held 'the power'
summary: Tumaco-Tolita artists were known for their intense realism in sculpting clay representations of humans.

title: تأثير إبستين يصل إلى "مؤتمر الديناصورات".. ماذا حدث؟
summary: قرر مؤتمر بريطاني متخصص في بحث تاريخ الديناصورات، منع حضور بعض علماء الحفريات المذكورين في ملفات جيفري إبستين، رجل الأعمال الأميركي المدان بانتهاكات جنسية.

title: في فيلم أميركي ضخم.. مشهد عن الأهرامات يثير غضب المصريين
summary: أثار مقطع من واحد من أشهر الأفلام الأميركية هذا العام، استياء عدد كبير من المصريين، بسبب معلومة تتعلق ببناء الأهرامات.

title: مقتل أشخاص في انهيار مبنى بشمال لبنان.. وبحث متواصل عن ناجين
summary: قُتل خمسة أشخاص على الأقل، الأحد، في مدينة طرابلس في شمال لبنان إثر انهيار مبنى، وفق ما أفاد الإعلام الرسمي، بينما تواصل فرق الإنقاذ البحث عن ناجين.
